subject: Mathematics

lesson.title: ALGEBRA
topics: Overview: Algebra is a branch of Mathematics that uses letters and symbols to represent numbers
and relationships between numbers. It helps us to represent unknown values using letters, write
mathematical statements called expressions and equations, find unknown values by solving
equations, and describe patterns and real-life situations mathematically. At Form 2 level, algebra
activities: expressions and applying algebraic methods accurately.
This topic has two sub-topics namely basic processes, and remainder and factor theorems.
 Analytical Thinking: Break down word problems into algebraic statements, interpret
algebraic expressions, identify relationship between variables, and compare different solution
methods and check accuracy of results.
 Collaboration: Work in groups to solve problems on algebra and compare solutions.
 Communication: Explain algebraic processes clearly using Mathematical language.
assessment: patterns and relationships in relation to Algebra and apply them in real-life situations.
Learning Activity 2: Factorising by grouping terms, quadratic expressions, and
